ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department where the employee works */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the employee */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary level of the employee (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "satisfaction_level" REAL /* Job satisfaction level of the employee (scale: 0-1) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "eval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_score" REAL /* Score of the evaluation (scale: 0-1) */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee working on the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the project in months */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_hours" (
  "work_hour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work hour entry */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "average_hours" INTEGER /* Average monthly hours worked */,
  "overtime_hours" INTEGER /* Average monthly overtime hours worked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_hour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_hours_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_tenure" (
  "tenure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tenure entry */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "tenure_years" INTEGER /* Number of years spent in the company */,
  "tenure_months" INTEGER /* Number of months spent in the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_tenure_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accidents" (
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accident */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee involved */,
  "accident_date" TEXT /* Date of the accident */,
  "accident_description" TEXT /* Description of the accident */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee promoted */,
  "promotion_date" TEXT /* Date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_role" TEXT /* Role after promotion */,
  "promotion_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leavers" (
  "leaver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaver */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who left */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date of leaving */,
  "reason_for_leaving" TEXT /* Reason for leaving (e.g., resignation, retirement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leavers_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR manager, department head, executive) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who attended the training */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date of the training */,
  "training_topic" TEXT /* Topic of the training */,
  "training_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who received the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date of the award */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., employee of the month, outstanding performance) */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)
